summary: Added orchestrate-active marker lifecycle to skill-orchestrate (write at Stage 2, clear at all exit points); added orchestrate-active check in lifecycle-notify.sh to suppress TTS mid-orchestrate while preserving tab color; removed --quiet from orchestrator-postflight.sh Stage 8b; added dim tab color transitions before plan/implement dispatches; added orchestrate-active crash recovery cleanup to wezterm-preflight-status.sh Tier 2.
